name: [GRIDHAND] Industry Specialist Agent - Restaurant: table booked → pre-order menu → upsell drinks

gridhand.scenario: Restaurant: table booked → pre-order menu → upsell drinks
gridhand.description: When a customer books a table at your restaurant through the online reservation system, GRIDHAND automatically triggers a workflow that sends a personalized pre-order menu to the customer's email 24 hours before their scheduled dining time, allowing them to browse and select their meal choices in advance. As the customer reviews the menu, GRIDHAND's integrated system suggests complementary drinks to pair with their selected dishes, sending a follow-up message with upsell options and special promotions, which the customer can easily add to their order. By streamlining the pre-order process and offering targeted drink pairings, your restaurant can increase average ticket sizes, reduce wait times, and enhance the overall dining experience for your customers.
